entries.name: Landslide
entries.desc: Conjure a path of shifting stone towards the target location, rooting enemies for 15 sec. Damage may cancel the effect.

entries.name: Obsidian Scales
entries.desc: Reinforce your scales, reducing damage taken by 30% . Lasts 12 sec.

entries.name: Expunge
entries.desc: Expunge toxins affecting an ally, removing all Poison effects.

entries.name: Natural Convergence
entries.desc: Disintegrate channels 20% faster.

entries.name: Heavy Wingbeats
entries.desc: Wing Buffet's cooldown is reduced by 2 min.

entries.name: Verdant Embrace
entries.desc: Fly to an ally and heal them for 4,020, or heal yourself for the same amount.

entries.name: Forger of Mountains
entries.desc: Landslide's cooldown is reduced by 30 sec, and it can withstand 200% more damage before breaking.

entries.name: Innate Magic
entries.desc: Essence regenerates 5% faster.

entries.name: Obsidian Bulwark
entries.desc: Obsidian Scales has an additional charge.

entries.name: Enkindled
entries.desc: Living Flame deals 3% more damage and healing.

entries.name: Scarlet Adaptation
entries.desc: Store 20% of your effective healing, up to 857. Your next damaging Living Flame consumes all stored healing to increase its damage dealt.

entries.name: Inner Radiance
entries.desc: Your Living Flame and Emerald Blossom are 30% more effective on yourself.

entries.name: Recall
entries.desc: You may reactivate Deep Breath within 3 sec after landing to travel back in time to your takeoff location.

entries.name: Clobbering Sweep
entries.desc: Tail Swipe's cooldown is reduced by 2 min.

entries.name: Tailwind
entries.desc: Hover increases your movement speed by 70% for the first 4 sec.

entries.name: Cauterizing Flame
entries.desc: Cauterize an ally's wounds, removing all Bleed, Poison, Curse, and Disease effects. Heals for 1,330 upon removing any effect.

entries.name: Ancient Flame
entries.desc: Casting Emerald Blossom or Verdant Embrace reduces the cast time of your next Living Flame by 40%.

entries.name: Instinctive Arcana
entries.desc: Your Magic damage done is increased by 2%.

entries.name: Tip the Scales
entries.desc: Compress time to make your next empowered spell cast instantly at its maximum empower level.

entries.name: Attuned to the Dream
entries.desc: Your healing done and healing received are increased by 2%.

entries.name: Sleep Walk
entries.desc: Disorient an enemy for 20 sec, causing them to sleep walk towards you. Damage has a chance to awaken them.

entries.name: Protracted Talons
entries.desc: Azure Strike damages 1 additional enemy.

entries.name: Inherent Resistance
entries.desc: Magic damage taken reduced by 2%.

entries.name: Draconic Legacy
entries.desc: Your Stamina is increased by 6%.

entries.name: Extended Flight
entries.desc: Hover lasts 4 sec longer.

entries.name: Bountiful Bloom
entries.desc: Emerald Blossom heals 2 additional allies.

entries.name: Regenerative Magic
entries.desc: Your Leech is increased by 2%.

entries.name: Blast Furnace
entries.desc: Fire Breath's damage over time lasts 4 sec longer.

entries.name: Exuberance
entries.desc: While above 75% health, your movement speed is increased by 10%.

entries.name: Renewing Blaze
entries.desc: Obsidian Scales surrounds you with a Renewing Blaze, causing 100% of the damage it prevented to be healed back over 8 sec.

entries.name: Walloping Blow
entries.desc: Wing Buffet and Tail Swipe knock enemies further and daze them, reducing movement speed by 70% for 4 sec.

entries.name: Panacea
entries.desc: Emerald Blossom and Verdant Embrace instantly heal you for 760 when cast.

entries.name: Stretch Time
entries.desc: While flying during Deep Breath, 100% of damage you would take is instead dealt over 10 sec.

entries.name: Unravel
entries.desc: Direct damage from Fire Breath consumes absorb shields from enemies, dealing 4,535 additional Spellfrost damage to them.

entries.name: Oppressing Roar
entries.desc: Let out a bone-shaking roar at enemies in a cone in front of you, increasing the duration of crowd controls that affect them by 50% in the next 10 sec.

entries.name: Foci of Life
entries.desc: Renewing Blaze restores you more quickly, causing damage you take to be healed back over 4 sec.

entries.name: Rescue
entries.desc: Swoop to an ally and fly with them to the target location. Clears movement impairing effects from you and your ally.

entries.name: Lush Growth
entries.desc: Green spells restore 5% more health.

entries.name: Source of Magic
entries.desc: Redirect your excess magic to a friendly healer for 1 hour. When you cast an empowered spell, you restore 0.25% of their maximum mana per empower level. Limit 1.

entries.name: Strike from Above
entries.desc: Glide speed and height increased by 10%.

entries.name: Leaping Flames
entries.desc: Fire Breath causes your next Living Flame to strike 1 additional target per empower level.

entries.name: Overawe
entries.desc: Oppressing Roar removes 1 Enrage effect from each enemy, and its cooldown is reduced by 30 sec.

entries.name: Aerial Mastery
entries.desc: Hover gains 1 additional charge.

entries.name: Twin Guardian
entries.desc: Rescue increases movement speed by 100% and allows spells to be cast while moving for 3 sec.

entries.name: Potent Mana
entries.desc: Source of Magic increases the target's healing and damage done by 3%.

entries.name: Terror of the Skies
entries.desc: Deep Breath stuns enemies for 3 sec.

entries.name: Time Spiral
entries.desc: Bend time, allowing you and your allies within 40 yds to cast their major movement ability once in the next 10 sec, even if it is on cooldown.

entries.name: Spatial Paradox
entries.desc:
Evoke a paradox for you and a friendly healer, allowing casting while moving and increasing the range of most spells by 100% for 10 sec.

Affects the nearest healer within 60 yds, if you do not have a healer targeted.

entries.name: Zephyr
entries.desc: Conjure an updraft to lift you and your 4 nearest allies within 20 yds into the air, reducing damage taken from area-of-effect attacks by 20% and increasing movement speed by 30% for 8 sec.

entries.name: Echo
entries.desc: Wrap an ally with temporal energy, healing them for 912 and causing your next healing spell to cast an additional time on that ally at 70% of normal healing. Essence spells cannot be Echoed.

entries.name: Dream Breath
entries.desc:
Inhale, gathering the power of the Dream. Release to exhale, healing yourself and 5 injured allies in a 40 yd cone in front of you for 1,634.

I:   Heals 700 instantly and 934 over 16 sec.

II:  Heals 934 instantly and 700 over 12 sec.

III: Heals 1,167 instantly and 467 over 8 sec.

entries.name: Reversion
entries.desc:
Reverse an ally's injuries, healing them for 1,092 over 12 sec.

When Reversion critically heals, its duration is extended by 2 sec, up to a maximum of 12 sec.

entries.name: Temporal Compression
entries.desc: Each cast of a Bronze spell causes your next empower spell to reach maximum level in 10% less time, stacking up to 4 times.

entries.name: Essence Burst
entries.desc: Living Flame has a 20% chance, and Reversion has a 15% chance to make your next Essence ability free.

entries.name: Rewind
entries.desc:
Rewind 30% of damage taken in the last 5 seconds by all allies within 40 yds. Always heals for at least 760.

Healing increased by 200% when not in a raid.

entries.name: Lifebind
entries.desc: Verdant Embrace temporarily bonds your life with an ally, causing your healing on either partner to heal the other for 60% of the amount. Lasts 8 sec.

entries.name: Essence Attunement
entries.desc: Essence Burst stacks 2 times.

entries.name: Time Dilation
entries.desc: Stretch time around an ally for the next 8 sec, causing 50% of damage they would take to instead be dealt over 8 sec.

entries.name: Unshakable
entries.desc: Your empower spells are 10% more effective. While charging a healing empower spell, you cannot be knocked back.

entries.name: Fluttering Seedlings
entries.desc:
Emerald Blossom sends out 1 flying seedling when it bursts, plus up to 2 additional seedlings if Emerald Blossom heals fewer than 3 allies.

Seedlings each heal an ally up to 40 yds away for 988.

entries.name: Font of Magic
entries.desc: Your empower spells' maximum level is increased by 1.

entries.name: Golden Hour
entries.desc: Reversion instantly heals the target for 15% of damage taken in the last 5 sec.

entries.name: Delay Harm
entries.desc: 15% of delayed damage from Time Dilation is absorbed.

entries.name: Just in Time
entries.desc: Time Dilation gains an additional charge, and its cooldown is reduced by 10 sec.

entries.name: Temporal Anomaly
entries.desc:
Send forward a vortex of temporal energy, absorbing 2,280 damage on you and any allies in its path. Absorption is reduced beyond 5 targets.

Applies Echo at 30% effectiveness on the first 5 allies it passes through.

entries.name: Empath
entries.desc: Empower spells increase your Essence regeneration rate by 100% for 8 sec.

entries.name: Spiritual Clarity
entries.desc: Dream Breath's cooldown is reduced by 10 sec.

entries.name: Exhilarating Burst
entries.desc: Each time you gain Essence Burst, your critical heals are 230% effective instead of the usual 200% for 10 sec.

entries.name: Field of Dreams
entries.desc: Every other Emerald Blossom has a 100% chance for one of your Fluttering Seedlings to grow into a new Emerald Blossom.

entries.name: Power Nexus
entries.desc: Increases your maximum Essence to 6.

entries.name: Time Lord
entries.desc: Echo replicates 50% more healing.

entries.name: Flow State
entries.desc: Empower spells cause time to flow 10% faster for you, increasing movement speed, cooldown recharge rate, and cast speed. Lasts 10 sec.

entries.name: Temporal Barrier
entries.desc: Send out a ripple of temporal energy, absorbing 3,420 damage and applying Echo at 30% effectiveness on your target and up to 4 allies within 40 yds.

entries.name: Nozdormu's Teachings
entries.desc: Temporal Anomaly reduces the cooldowns of your empower spells by 5 sec.

entries.name: Call of Ysera
entries.desc: Dream Breath healing increased by 20%, and Living Flame healing increased by 30%.

entries.name: Dream Flight
entries.desc:
Take in a deep breath and fly to the targeted location, healing all allies in your path for 1,900 immediately, and 4,306 over 15 sec, reduced beyond 5 targets.

Removes all root effects. You are immune to movement impairing and loss of control effects.

Damage taken while you are flying is absorbed, up to 100% of your maximum health.

entries.name: Stasis
entries.desc: Causes your next 3 helpful spells to be duplicated and stored in a time lock. You may reactivate Stasis any time within 30 sec to quickly unleash their magic.

entries.name: Grace Period
entries.desc: Your healing is increased by 10% on targets with your Reversion.

entries.name: Spark of Insight
entries.desc: Consuming a full Temporal Compression grants you Essence Burst.

entries.name: Ouroboros
entries.desc: Casting Echo grants one stack of Ouroboros, increasing the healing of your next Emerald Blossom by 30%, stacking up to 5 times.

entries.name: Life-Giver's Flame
entries.desc: Fire Breath and Deep Breath heal 5 nearby injured allies for 80% of damage done to up to 5 targets, split evenly among them.

entries.name: Inner Flame
entries.desc: Casting Dream Flight or Stasis increases your healing over time by 60% and causes Living Flame and Reversion to have a 100% increased chance to grant Essence Burst. Lasts 15 sec.

entries.name: Temporal Artificer
entries.desc: Rewind's cooldown is reduced by 60 sec.

entries.name: Energy Loop
entries.desc: Disintegrate deals 35% more damage and generates 1,080 mana over its duration.

entries.name: Time of Need
entries.desc:
When you or an ally fall below 30% health, a version of yourself enters your timeline and heals them for 12,061. Your alternate self continues healing for 8 sec before returning to their timeline.

May only occur once every 60 sec.

entries.name: Renewing Breath
entries.desc: Dream Breath healing is increased by 15%.

entries.name: Lifeforce Mender
entries.desc: Red spells deal 20% additional damage and healing.

entries.name: Timeless Magic
entries.desc: Reversion, Time Dilation, Echo, and Temporal Anomaly last 15% longer and cost 15% less mana.

entries.name: Dream Simulacrum
entries.desc: Verdant Embrace healing is increased by 30%. In addition, it no longer causes you to leap to your target, instead sending forth a Dream Simulacrum.

entries.name: Wings of Liberty
entries.desc: Verdant Embrace gains an additional charge.

entries.name: Titan's Gift
entries.desc: Essence Burst increases the effectiveness of your next Essence ability by 35%.

entries.name: Lifespark
entries.desc: Reversion healing has a chance to cause your next Living Flame to cast instantly and deal 50% increased healing or damage. Stacks up to 2 charges.

entries.name: Twin Echoes
entries.desc: Casting Emerald Blossom causes your next Echo to cast on an additional ally within 25 yards at 100% effectiveness. Stacks up to 2 charges.

entries.name: Tempo Charged
entries.desc: Bronze healing and absorption increased by 15%.

entries.name: Merithra's Blessing
entries.desc:
Essence abilities have a chance to infuse your next Reversion with the power of the Green Dragonflight, upgrading it to Merithra's Blessing:

 Merithra's Blessing
Spring a bloom of life from your target, healing them and up to 4 other allies within 30 yards for 950. Blooms may heal your primary target multiple times if no nearby injured allies are present.

entries.name: Titanic Precision
entries.desc: Living Flame and Azure Strike have 1 extra chance to trigger Essence Burst when they critically strike.

entries.name: Consume Flame
entries.desc:
Disintegrate damage consumes 1.0 sec of Fire Breath from enemies it damages, detonating it for 150% of the amount consumed.

Pyre damage consumes 4 sec of Fire Breath from enemies it damages, detonating it for 115% of the amount consumed.

entries.name: Fulminous Roar
entries.desc: Fire Breath deals its damage 20% more often.

entries.name: Lifecinders
entries.desc: Obsidian Scales also applies to your target or 1 nearby injured ally at 50% value.

entries.name: Draconic Instincts
entries.desc: Your wounds have a small chance to cauterize, healing you for 30% of damage taken. Occurs more often from attacks that deal high damage.

entries.name: Trailblazer
entries.desc: Hover and Deep Breath travel 40% faster, and Hover travels 40% further.

entries.name: Shape of Flame
entries.desc: Tail Swipe and Wing Buffet scorch enemies and blind them with ash, causing their next attack within 4 sec to miss.

entries.name: Deep Exhalation
entries.desc: Fire Breath's damage over time lasts 4 sec longer.

entries.name: Burning Adrenaline
entries.desc: Fire Breath reaches its maximum empower level 20% faster.

entries.name: Conduit of Flame
entries.desc: Critical strike chance against targets above 50% health increased by 15%.

entries.name: Legacy of the Lifebinder
entries.desc: Fire Breath gains an additional charge.

entries.name: Enkindle
entries.desc: Essence abilities are enhanced with Flame, dealing 20% of healing or damage done as Fire over 8 sec.

entries.name: Expanded Lungs
entries.desc: Fire Breath's damage over time is increased by 30%. Dream Breath's heal over time is increased by 30%.

entries.name: Ashes in Motion
entries.desc: Fire Breath's cooldown is reduced by 5 sec.

entries.name: Fire Torrent
entries.desc: Twin Flame bounces to up to 2 additional targets.

entries.name: Essence Well
entries.desc: Fire Breath has a 50% chance to generate Essence Burst.

entries.name: Twin Flame
entries.desc: Consuming Essence Burst fires a twin flame, striking your target for 684 Fire damage.

entries.name: Reverberations
entries.desc: Upheaval deals 50% additional damage over 8 sec.

entries.name: Afterimage
entries.desc: Empower spells send up to 3 Chrono Flames to your targets.

entries.name: Instability Matrix
entries.desc: Each time you cast an empower spell, unstable time magic reduces its cooldown by up to 6 sec.

entries.name: Double-time
entries.desc: Ebon Might and Prescience gain a chance equal to your critical strike chance to grant 50% additional stats.

entries.name: Time Convergence
entries.desc:
Non-defensive abilities with a 45 second or longer cooldown grant 5% Intellect for 15 sec.

Essence spells extend the duration by 1 sec.

entries.name: Temporality
entries.desc: Warp reduces damage taken by 20%, starting high and reducing over 3 sec.

entries.name: Motes of Acceleration
entries.desc: Warp leaves a trail of Motes of Acceleration. Allies who come in contact with a mote gain 20% increased movement speed for 30 sec.

entries.name: Golden Opportunity
entries.desc: Prescience lasts 15% longer.

entries.name: Nozdormu Adept
entries.desc: Prescience cooldown reduced by 2 sec and it grants 1% additional critical strike chance.

entries.name: Warp
entries.desc:
Hover now causes you to briefly warp out of existence and appear at your destination. Hover's cooldown is also reduced by 5 sec.

Hover continues to allow Evoker spells to be cast while moving.

entries.name: Primacy
entries.desc: For each damage over time effect from Upheaval, gain 3% haste, up to 9%.

entries.name: Chrono Flame
entries.desc: Living Flame is enhanced with Bronze magic, repeating 25% of the damage or healing you dealt to the target in the last 5 sec as Arcane, up to 950.

entries.name: Temporal Burst
entries.desc: Tip the Scales overloads you with temporal energy, increasing your haste, movement speed, and cooldown recovery rate by 30%, decreasing over 30 sec.

entries.name: Overclock
entries.desc: Chrono Flames' maximum damage or healing is increased by 40%, up to 1,330 Arcane.

entries.name: Chronal Dynamo
entries.desc: Living Flame's cast time is reduced by 0.2 sec, and it deals 50% increased damage or healing when it is a non-instant cast.

entries.name: Chronoboon
entries.desc: Tip the Scales' cooldown is reduced by 30 sec.
